name: Grapeview MS
description: Grapeview MS is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Grapeview, WA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Harstene Pointe Community
description: Harstene Pointe Community is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Shelton, WA. There is 1 outdoor court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. A membership is required to play.

name: LCF Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at LCF Pickleball Club in Shelton, WA! There are 2 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.
fees: Private — Invitation only, no fees or dues.  Franklin X40 Balls provided.

name: Transit Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Transit Community Center in Shelton, WA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
fees: Fee required — Parks and Recreation program is $3 per day
